title: Customize dependency column does not open

posts.author: Nilis (Nili Singer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am trying to customize dependency column by selecting dependency >> Settings>> customize dependency column but the customization screen does not pop-up.
By the way I am the administrator so it does not seem to be a permission issue.
Any idea?
Thanks,
Nili

posts.author: Nilis (Nili Singer)
posts.cookedHtml:
The problem was solved deleting history data and cookies from the browser.
Thanks
